hero.description: Stories, analysis, and updates from the field.

hero.image_alt: ADT partners and field teams delivering last-mile services in Western Kenya
hero.description: Akukuranut Development Trust (ADT) is a permanent, audit-ready institution under Cap 164—built to convert partner resources into measurable results across Western Kenya’s most vulnerable households.

legitimacy.description: ADT bridges local human capital and external resources with a simple promise: governance that protects investment, and delivery systems that compound outcomes.

permanence.title: Institutional permanence (Cap 164)
permanence.description: ADT is registered under the Trustees (Perpetual Succession) Act, Cap 164. Partners don’t fund a temporary project—they strengthen a durable institution built to carry systems forward.

governance.title: Audit-ready governance
governance.description: Accountability is engineered into the model: fiduciary oversight, professional technical delivery, and community participation that turns local legitimacy into measurable execution.

discipline.title: Implementation discipline
discipline.description: Our delivery systems link clinics, schools, caregivers, and field teams into a single continuity engine—so investment becomes outcomes, not activity.

aside.title: Hyper-local intelligence, backed by systems
aside.body: Born in the Teso community, ADT operates with cultural alignment by design—paired with professional technical staff and disciplined reporting.

models.description: ADT is flexible by design: fund a domain, co-deliver a system, strengthen capacity, enable logistics, or invest in a social enterprise that sustains programs.

co_implementation.title: Co-implementation partnerships
co_implementation.description: Work with ADT as a last-mile delivery partner—aligning roles, timelines, safeguards, and reporting so implementation is fast, locally legitimate, and measurable.
bullets: Field delivery across clinics, schools, and households

program_funding.title: Program funding (by domain)
program_funding.description: Fund the resilience pipeline by domain—Healthy, Schooled, Stable—or sponsor integrated delivery that moves households from survival to sustainable self-reliance.

technical_assistance.title: Technical assistance & systems strengthening
technical_assistance.description: Strengthen institutional capacity: clinical-community referral systems, safeguarding, data discipline, M&E, and workforce capability building.
bullets: Data quality, reporting discipline, and learning loops
Training and capacity building for staff and caregivers

in_kind.title: In-kind + logistics enablement
in_kind.description: Equip the field: mobility tools, ICT infrastructure, and operational assets that reduce friction and multiply household visit frequency and response speed.
bullets: ICT and power backup for always-on delivery

impact_investing.title: Impact investing (social enterprise)
impact_investing.description: Scale ADT’s apiculture value chain into processing, branding, and distribution—creating diversified household incomes while building a sustainable revenue engine for social impact.
bullets: Processing + packaging capacity for quality assurance
Market access, branding, and revenue recycling

portfolio.description: ADT’s Busia Resilience Model moves households from survival to development to prosperity. Partners can fund a domain, strengthen a system, or co-deliver integrated outcomes.

healthy.title: Healthy Domain
healthy.label: Clinical Excellence
healthy.headline: Close the gap between clinics and households.
healthy.description: Hospitals provide medicine. ADT provides adherence architecture: household follow-up, psychosocial support, mobility-enabled tracing, and continuity—especially for CALHIV and PMTCT mothers.
highlights: Pediatric adherence support through play therapy
Nutrition assessment linked to household action

schooled.title: Schooled Domain
schooled.label: Educational Equity
schooled.headline: Keep learners in school—then unlock opportunity.
schooled.description: We remove the specific barriers—fees, uniforms, materials—that push vulnerable children out of classrooms, then link high performers to scholarship pathways and guide older youth into employability.
highlights: Scholarship linkages (Elimu, Wings to Fly, JKF)

stable.title: Stable Domain
stable.label: Household Resilience
stable.headline: Capitalize the caregiver. Fortify the household.
stable.description: Economic stability is the foundation of child protection. Through VSLA systems, productive assets, and climate-smart value chains, we turn caregivers into economic actors with diversified income engines.

partners.description: ADT operates as a bridge: aligning government, civil society, and private sector partners with a community-owned implementation philosophy.

shared_accountability.title: Shared accountability
shared_accountability.description: Clear roles, transparent stewardship, and disciplined reporting—so partners can track delivery with confidence.

government_aligned.title: Government-aligned delivery
government_aligned.description: Collaborative governance with public institutions and community structures to ensure legitimacy and continuity.

implementation_mindset.title: Implementation partner mindset
implementation_mindset.description: We treat delivery like a system: plan, execute, measure, learn, and scale—across domains.

local_intelligence.title: Local intelligence at scale
local_intelligence.description: Born in the Teso community, executed with technical teams and field networks that reach households reliably.

investment.description: We have proof and methodology. The next leap is infrastructure—digital, energy, logistics, and processing capacity—so impact compounds with lower delivery friction.

digital_hub.title: The Digital Hub
digital_hub.description: Upgrade the computer room into a modern ICT lab that trains youth, strengthens data capture, and increases coordination speed across programs.
bullets: Stronger data entry and reporting discipline

solar_backup.title: Climate-Resilient Power
solar_backup.description: Build solar backup to keep case tracking, data workflows, and reporting online—especially during outages.

logistics_fleet.title: Logistics Fleet
logistics_fleet.description: Acquire motorbikes and a utility vehicle for deep-rural outreach—reducing missed follow-ups and accelerating referral response.

honey_processing.title: Honey Processing Unit
honey_processing.description: Build processing and packaging capacity to formalize apiculture, improve quality assurance, and scale a regional brand that funds programs.
bullets: Sustainable revenue stream for OVC services

cta.title: Fund delivery. Build systems. Scale what works.
cta.description: Whether you’re a donor, an implementation partner, or an impact investor—ADT offers a permanent, audit-ready platform to deliver measurable results across Western Kenya’s most vulnerable households.

hero.image_alt: ADT field delivery teams implementing last-mile programs across Busia County
hero.description: ADT’s projects are not stand-alone activities—they are engineered pathways. From clinical adherence to scholarship linkages, from savings systems to social enterprise, we design interventions as one institutional system that moves households from survival to prosperity.

navigator.description: We organize delivery through the Busia Resilience Model—so partners can fund a domain, co-deliver a system, or invest in the infrastructure that multiplies outcomes.

healthy.title: Healthy Domain
healthy.short: Clinical-community synergy for adherence, PMTCT continuity, and nutrition outcomes.
healthy.label: Clinical Excellence
healthy.headline: Close the gap between clinics and households.
healthy.description: Hospitals provide medicine. ADT provides the household follow-up, psychosocial support, and mobility-enabled tracing that makes treatment work—especially for CALHIV and PMTCT mothers.
highlights: Pediatric adherence support through play therapy
Referral loop for nutrition + clinical continuity

schooled.title: Schooled Domain
schooled.short: Retention support, MHM dignity kits, scholarship linkages, and TVET transitions.
schooled.label: Educational Equity
schooled.headline: Keep learners in school—then unlock opportunity.
schooled.description: We remove the specific barriers—fees, uniforms, supplies—that push vulnerable children out of classrooms. We then link high performers to national scholarship pathways and guide older youth into employability.
highlights: Scholarship linkages (Elimu, Wings to Fly, JKF)

stable.title: Stable Domain
stable.short: Financial inclusion, productive assets, climate-smart value chains, and social enterprise.
stable.label: Household Resilience
stable.headline: Capitalize the caregiver. Fortify the household.
stable.description: Economic stability is the foundation of child protection. Through VSLA+ systems, productive asset kits, and climate-smart livelihoods, we turn caregivers into economic actors—with diversified income engines.

featured.description: Each flagship represents an end-to-end model: clear problem definition, culturally aligned delivery, measurable outcomes, and a pathway to scale.

clinical_excellence.title: Pediatric HIV & Integrated Clinical Systems
clinical_excellence.description: A high-precision last-mile intervention designed to increase pediatric adherence, retention in care, and viral load suppression through clinical-community integration.
clinical_excellence.image_alt: Community health work and clinical linkage services
highlights: Nutrition assessment and household action plans

schooled_accelerator.title: The Schooled Lifecycle Accelerator
schooled_accelerator.description: A sequenced education pathway that keeps learners in school, restores dignity for adolescent girls, and opens scholarship and employability doors.
highlights: MHM dignity kits to reduce absenteeism

vsla_plus.title: Household Resilience & Economic Fortification
vsla_plus.description: A caregiver capitalization framework anchored in VSLA/VSLAs, micro-enterprise coaching, and productive asset kits—built to reduce vulnerability and strengthen household stability.
vsla_plus.image_alt: Caregivers in savings groups and micro-enterprise support
highlights: Financial literacy and small business discipline
Productive launch kits for viable enterprises

apiculture_enterprise.title: Apiculture Social Enterprise (ASL)
apiculture_enterprise.description: An impact-investing model that creates diversified income for HIV-affected households while building a sustainable revenue engine that supports ADT’s broader social mission.
apiculture_enterprise.image_alt: Beekeeping and honey production as a livelihood engine
highlights: Value chain expansion to processing + branding
Income stability for widows and elderly caregivers

mobility_network.title: Logistics & Mobility Network
mobility_network.description: A co-financing engine with World Bicycle Relief and ADT SACCO that increases visit frequency, speeds defaulter tracing, and unlocks quality last-mile delivery.
highlights: Rapid response tracing and referral continuity

implementation.description: ADT is a permanent institution under Cap 164, designed to convert resources into accountable results. Our delivery framework combines community participation, technical staff execution, and measurable reporting.

loop.title: The Clinical–Community Referral Loop
loop.body: We solve the last-mile gap by linking clinics, case workers, caregivers, and schools into one continuity engine. That loop reduces defaulting, improves adherence, and keeps children on track across domains.
bullets: Psychosocial support and caregiver capability building

steps.title: Diagnose the bottleneck
steps.description: Start with community-defined needs and evidence: clinical data signals, school retention gaps, household vulnerability mapping, and field intelligence.

steps.title: Co-design with governance
steps.description: Align on a shared theory of change, accountability, and roles across partners—government, CSOs, private sector, caregivers, and ADT’s Trust structures.

steps.title: Deliver at the last mile
steps.description: Deploy trained case workers and community volunteers with mobility enablement, integrated referral pathways, and culturally aligned delivery methods.

steps.title: Measure, report, improve
steps.description: Track outputs and outcomes through disciplined reporting—then iterate the model to raise efficiency and expand the footprint.

pipeline.description: We have methodology and proof. The next leap is infrastructure—digital, energy, logistics, and processing capacity—so impact compounds with lower delivery friction.

items.title: The Digital Hub
items.description: Upgrade the computer room into a modern ICT lab that trains youth, strengthens data capture, and improves program coordination.
items.image_alt: ICT training and youth digital literacy
bullets: Stronger data entry and reporting discipline

items.title: Climate-Resilient Power
items.description: Build solar backup to keep data systems, reporting workflows, and case tracking online—especially during outages.

items.title: Logistics Fleet
items.description: Acquire motorbikes and a utility vehicle for deep-rural outreach, reducing missed follow-ups and accelerating referral response.

items.title: Honey Processing Unit
items.description: Build a processing and packaging center to formalize apiculture, improve quality assurance, and scale a regional brand that funds programs.
bullets: Sustainable revenue stream for OVC services

cta.description: Whether you’re a donor, an implementation partner, or an impact investor—ADT offers a permanent, audit-ready platform to deliver measurable results across Western Kenya’s most vulnerable households.

hero.image_alt: ADT field team supporting families in Busia County
hero.description: ADT connects clinical outcomes, education continuity, and economic participation into one integrated pathway—so communities don’t just recover, they advance.

stats.description: A permanent, audit-ready Trust delivering results across households, clinics, and schools—at scale.

children_supported.description: OVC reached through coordinated health, education, and protection services

strategic_scholarship_linkages.title: Strategic Scholarship Linkages
strategic_scholarship_linkages.description: ADT acts as a talent scout for the most vulnerable. We identify high-performing OVCs and link them to prestigious national scholarships including:

result.label: Result:
result.description: Over 6,000 children have accessed quality health and social services through our coordinated intervention.

beyond_classroom.title: Beyond Classroom
beyond_classroom.description: For older OVCs, we facilitate apprenticeships and technical vocational training (TVET) to ensure a direct path to employability.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Delivering essential healthcare services and medical support to children in need across underserved communities.

community.title: Community
community.description: Empowering communities through sustainable development programs, capacity building, and social initiatives.

domains.description: Each domain is a strategic layer. Together they form a resilience pipeline that moves families forward.

education.title: Schooled Domain
education.description: We remove the specific barriers that push vulnerable children out of the classroom—fees, uniforms, and essential learning materials—while linking top performers to national scholarships.

highlights.1: Scholarship linkages (Elimu, Wings to Fly, JKF)

healthcare.title: Healthy Domain
healthcare.description: We solve the last-mile problem in healthcare. Clinics provide medicine; ADT provides the adherence, psychosocial support, and household follow-up that makes medicine work.

highlights.2: Referral loop for nutrition and PMTCT continuity

community.description: We strengthen household resilience through savings groups, asset kits, and climate-smart livelihoods—so caregivers become economic participants.

highlights.0: SILC / VSLA group formation and coaching
highlights.1: Productive asset kits for viable micro-enterprises

community_block.title: Community Development
community_block.description: Empowering communities through sustainable development programs, capacity building, and social initiatives.

timeline.description: From urgent stabilization to long-term prosperity: ADT's model moves people through sequenced, evidence-backed steps.
timeline.discovery_description: Discover how your support transforms lives through our comprehensive, multi-phase approach to creating lasting change.

rescue.title: Rescue & Immediate Care
rescue.description: Providing urgent assistance and safe shelter to children in crisis situations.

rehabilitation.title: Rehabilitation
rehabilitation.description: Supporting comprehensive physical, emotional, and psychological recovery.

education.title: Education & Development
education.description: Unlocking potential through quality education and skill development.

reintegration.title: Reintegration
reintegration.description: Supporting successful transition back to family or independent living.

0.title: Stabilize
0.description: Immediate needs and risk reduction—safe referrals, nutrition support, and household case management.

1.title: Restore
1.description: Rebuild health and learning routines through consistent adherence support and education continuity.

2.title: Accelerate
2.description: Talent linkages and human-capital acceleration through scholarship pathways, skills, and mentorship.

3.title: Sustain
3.description: Households transition into economic participation through savings groups, assets, and enterprise.

healthcare.title: Clinical Outcomes Driven by Child-Centric Innovation

clinical_excellence.label: Clinical Excellence
clinical_excellence.description: Achieving optimal treatment outcomes through precision interventions

retention_rate.label: Care Retention
retention_rate.description: Ensuring continuous support and follow-up care

facilities_served.label: Health Facilities
facilities_served.description: High-volume clinical centers across Western Kenya

metrics.metrics_description: Discover how we track progress from community needs to sustainable outcomes through our comprehensive measurement framework.
metrics.description: ADT tracks the full lifecycle of delivery—from community-identified needs to measurable outcomes and sustainable systems.

description.text: mobilizes resources to bridge the gap between systemic vulnerability and sustainable self-reliance for
description.location: across the Teso and Butula corridors

impact.description: 35 years of indigenous leadership delivering measurable transformation across Western Kenya's most vulnerable communities

children_supported.label: Children Supported
children_supported.description: Orphans and Vulnerable Children receiving comprehensive care
children_supported.icon_description: Group of children representing our beneficiary community

households_reached.label: Households Reached
households_reached.description: Families benefiting from economic empowerment programs

programmes.tagline: Building Community Resilience Through Integrated Development
programmes.description: ADT's five-pillar strategic portfolio addresses the complete lifecycle of vulnerability, from clinical intervention to economic self-reliance.

pediatricHIV.title: Pediatric HIV & Integrated Clinical Systems
pediatricHIV.description: Precision clinical interventions achieving 95-95-95 saturation through Play Therapy and Assisted Disclosure models, improving CALHIV treatment adherence while PMTCT Continuum ensures 100% retention in care for HIV-positive mothers.
pediatricHIV.image_alt: Healthcare worker providing clinical care to children in rural facility

schooled.title: The 'Schooled' Lifecycle Accelerator
schooled.description: Breaking intergenerational poverty through educational equity by addressing schooling costs through levies, uniforms, and menstrual hygiene kits, while securing placements in national programs like Elimu, Wings to Fly, and JKF fund.
schooled.image_alt: Students in uniform receiving educational materials and scholarships

householdResilience.title: Household Resilience & Economic Fortification
householdResilience.image_alt: Caregivers managing savings group and receiving business equipment

apiculture.title: The Apiculture Social Enterprise
apiculture.description: Impact investing in sustainable livelihoods through beekeeping. We're transitioning traditional beekeepers into commercial-scale honey production, seeking partners to scale processing and branding into a regional honey brand that funds ADT's social mission.
apiculture.image_alt: Beekeepers managing modern apiary with honey processing equipment

mobility.title: ADT Logistics & Mobility Network
mobility.image_alt: Case workers with bicycles and motorbikes reaching remote communities

participate.description: Every action counts. Discover how your support can transform lives and create lasting change in our community.

donate.title: Donate
donate.description: Make a one-time or recurring gift that changes lives and creates lasting impact through our 35-year legacy of community transformation.
donate.icon_description: Donation bell representing financial support for ADT's programs

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.description: Support a child directly through our child development program, watch them grow, and be part of their success story in the Busia Resilience Model.
sponsor.icon_description: Person silhouette representing child sponsorship and direct support

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.description: Share your skills, time, and passion with our frontline case workers to create meaningful change in Western Kenya's most vulnerable communities.
volunteer.icon_description: Plus sign representing volunteer contribution and community service

in_kind.title: In-Kind Gifts
in_kind.description: Donate essential goods and supplies that directly support our programs, from productive assets to educational materials for our 6,708 children and youth.
in_kind.icon_description: Gift box representing in-kind donations and material support

cta.description: Your contribution helps provide love, care, and life-changing opportunities to 6,708 children and vulnerable youth across Western Kenya's most vulnerable communities.

hero.image_alt: ADT community leaders and beneficiaries in Western Kenya
hero.badge: Built on Trust. Governed by Accountability.
hero.description: A locally led Trust with a permanent legal foundation—built to translate community participation into measurable progress across health, education, and household resilience.

mission_vision.description: Our mission and vision are not slogans—they are operating standards. They govern how we listen, how we design, and how we deliver with integrity.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide a robust platform for community groups to share experience, analyze challenges, and implement practical, locally-owned solutions that reduce poverty, disease, and illiteracy.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: An empowered and organized community living free from hunger, diseases, and poverty—able to thrive through self-reliance and collective action.

legal.description: ADT is registered under the Trustees (Perpetual Succession) Act (Cap 164). This means we are not a temporary project vehicle—we are a permanent institution with continuity, governance discipline, and donor-grade accountability.

cards.title: Perpetuity
cards.description: Our mission and assets are held in perpetuity for community benefit—built for long-term outcomes, not short-term cycles.

cards.title: Audit-Ready Governance
cards.description: Clear fiduciary responsibility and governance structure that supports transparent reporting and partner confidence.

cards.title: Investment Security
cards.description: Donor resources strengthen an institution that remains—creating durable systems and compounding impact over time.

philosophy.description: Development fails when people are treated as recipients. ADT builds platforms where communities lead the analysis, own the decisions, and co-deliver the solutions—so results sustain beyond funding timelines.

pillars.title: Participatory Methods
pillars.description: We use locally grounded facilitation so households and groups define priorities and measure progress together.

pillars.title: Holistic Integration
pillars.description: Health, education, and livelihoods are interconnected. We design interventions as one system—not siloed projects.

quote.title: What participation looks like
quote.body: We convene groups, strengthen governance, and build practical planning habits—so communities can negotiate resources, protect children, and invest in resilience with discipline.

values.description: Values are our quality control. They shape the way we safeguard dignity, steward resources, and deliver with professionalism.

items.title: Accountability & Transparency
items.description: We steward resources responsibly with clear reporting, measurable outcomes, and honest communication.

items.title: Professionalism
items.description: We deliver with technical discipline—case management, referrals, and program execution that stands up to scrutiny.

items.title: Teamwork
items.description: We collaborate across government, civil society, and the private sector to scale what works.

items.title: Respect for Human Dignity
items.description: We protect rights and uphold safeguarding—especially for women, children, and vulnerable households.

timeline.description: Our story is a progression of institutional strength—expanding from community mobilization into a permanent, legally recognized platform for measurable transformation.

1989.title: Grassroots Origins
1989.description: ADT begins as a locally-led movement—mobilizing community structures to confront poverty, illness, and low school retention.

2001.title: Formal Registration
2001.description: Registered under Cap 164, ADT becomes a permanent Trust—strengthening governance, institutional continuity, and partner confidence.

2024.title: Delivery at Scale
2024.description: Implementing USAID 4TheChild with clinical-community integration—supporting 6,708 OVC and strengthening 2,765 households.

2030.title: Resilience Infrastructure
2030.description: Scaling the Busia Resilience Model through digital systems, mobility, and climate-smart livelihood value chains.

leadership.description: Impact requires governance, technical excellence, and trusted community presence. Our structure ensures accountability while keeping delivery grounded at household level.

trustees.title: Board of Trustees
trustees.description: High-integrity community leaders providing strategic direction, fiduciary oversight, and long-term institutional discipline.

technical.title: Technical Staff
technical.description: Professionals in public health, social work, education support, and livelihoods—delivering evidence-backed interventions with quality assurance.

volunteers.title: Community Volunteers
volunteers.description: Frontline advocates embedded in local realities—supporting tracing, follow-up, and safeguarding through community legitimacy.

governance.description: Our governance is designed for durability: clear oversight, professional delivery, and structured community participation.

board.title: Trustee Governance
board.description: Provides strategic oversight, fiduciary stewardship, and institutional continuity.

staff.title: Technical Execution
staff.description: Runs field delivery with monitoring, learning, and quality improvement.

volunteers.title: Community Presence
volunteers.description: Ensures trust, responsiveness, and last-mile continuity in household support.

transparency.description: We believe trust is earned through openness. We track resources, report clearly, and optimize allocations to maximize frontline impact.

overview.title: Financial Overview
overview.body: ADT maintains disciplined stewardship with partner-grade accountability—so resources translate into outcomes at household and facility level.

allocation.title: Financial Allocation
allocation.description: Our allocation prioritizes program delivery while maintaining governance, compliance, and responsible fundraising.

cta.title: Partner with a Permanent Institution
cta.description: Whether you fund a domain, invest in institutional infrastructure, or join as an implementation partner—ADT is your audit-ready vehicle for long-term transformation in Western Kenya.
